title: verbascum × rumiciforme
intro: Verbascum × rumiciforme, also known as the yellow mullein or mullein, is a biennial plant that belongs to the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Verbascum × rumiciforme include soothing sore throats, reducing inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
